diagrams.title: Permutation vs Combination Decision Tree
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing when to use permutation vs combination: Does order matter? Yes → Permutation (nPr). No → Combination (nCr).
diagrams.purpose: Helps students quickly decide which counting principle to apply in problem-solving

diagrams.title: Circular Permutation Visual
diagrams.description: Shows n distinct objects arranged around a circle. Demonstrates that rotating all objects creates same arrangement. Fix one position to break symmetry.
elements: Circle with labeled positions 1 to n
Dotted circle showing all rotations of same arrangement
diagrams.purpose: Visualizes why circular permutations use (n-1)! not n!

diagrams.title: Derangement Inclusion-Exclusion Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the inclusion-exclusion principle applied for derangements. Visual representation of subtracting sets where at least one element is fixed.
elements: Venn diagram of overlapping sets A1, A2, A3,...
diagrams.purpose: Helps understand how derangement formula is derived using inclusion-exclusion principle
